title: Design System: One Tool to Rule Them All — Quarto Workshop

display.purpose: Page titles only. Italic <em> renders in Warm Coral.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase, <=4 words: chips, tags, table headers, sidebar/TOC labels.

mono.purpose: Code blocks and inline code (IBM Plex Mono).

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.value: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 4%, transparent), 0 6px 24px -10px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 10%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow under cards, callouts, code blocks. Warm, barely there.

shadows.name: lifted-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for clickable cards, paired with translateY(-2px).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Color and link transitions (nav links, copy button, link underline).

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Card transform + box-shadow + border-color on hover.

breakpoints.name: card-min
breakpoints.purpose: Subject card grid min track (repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr))).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill button, ink fill that warms into Deep Indigo on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #1A1B2E; color: #FBF7F0; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3D2F8C; color: #FBF7F0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D2F8C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent pill with a hairline rule; fills to Paper 2 on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #1A1B2E; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 12%, transparent); border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F4EFE4; border-color: #3A3B52; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D2F8C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Subject Card (on-brand target)
components.description: Clickable card with a hairline rule on all four sides and a 2px hover lift. No colored left-stripe, no numbered marker — the corrected form the homepage cards are being moved toward.
components.html: FoundationsPlain-text authoringMarkdown, YAML, and Quarto's project model — the building blocks every output shares.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.35rem; background: #F4EFE4; color: #1A1B2E; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 12%, transparent); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 4%, transparent), 0 6px 24px -10px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 10%, transparent); transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,27,46,0.12), 0 2px 6px rgba(26,27,46,0.07); border-color: #3D2F8C; } .ds-card-kicker { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.74em; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B6275; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.12rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #3A3B52; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Mono uppercase pill on a soft-accent fill with parent-accent text.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #EDE9FA; color: #3D2F8C; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.74em; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.25em 0.7em; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Inline Code
components.description: Moss text on a moss-soft fill with a hairline moss-tinted border.
components.html: Run quarto check to verify.
components.css: .ds-code { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; background: #E0EFE9; color: #2F7D6A; padding: 0.12em 0.38em; border-radius: 0.35rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #2F7D6A 18%, transparent); }

components.name: Note Callout
components.description: Quarto-native callout: Paper 2 body, 4px indigo left-accent (the one sanctioned thick left-edge), ambient shadow.
components.html:
Workshop idea
Write once in a plain text source file and render to HTML, PDF, DOCX, and slides.
components.css: .ds-callout { background: #F4EFE4; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 12%, transparent); border-left: 4px solid #3D2F8C; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.9rem 1.1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 4%, transparent), 0 6px 24px -10px color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 10%, transparent); } .ds-callout-header { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #3D2F8C; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; } .ds-callout-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #1A1B2E; }

components.name: Quartile Rule (signature)
components.description: Section break rendered as a 10px four-square mark in the brand's four accents — the press colophon.
components.css: .ds-quartile-rule { border: none; height: 1px; background: color-mix(in oklab, #1A1B2E 12%, transparent); margin: 2.5rem 0; position: relative; } .ds-quartile-rule::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 10px; height: 10px; background-color: #FBF7F0; background-image: linear-gradient(#3D2F8C,#3D2F8C), linear-gradient(#D9543F,#D9543F), linear-gradient(#2F7D6A,#2F7D6A), linear-gradient(#C98A2B,#C98A2B); background-size: 50% 50%; background-position: top left, top right, bottom left, bottom right; background-repeat: no-repeat; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This is an editorial press rendered in HTML. The page is warm paper stock; the type is set, not typed; and the system carries four signature accent colors — indigo, coral, moss, amber — as its four 'quarters,' one per family of Quarto output. The whole site is its own proof of concept: a Quarto site that teaches Quarto, so every surface has to read as something a careful researcher would be proud to publish. Restraint is the house style; warmth comes from the paper, the Newsreader serif, and the quartile accents, never from effects.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper ground (#FBF7F0), deep indigo-black ink (#1A1B2E) — never pure white, never pure black.
Four-accent 'quartile' system, used sparingly and meaningfully, one accent per use-case family.
Serif display (Newsreader) over sans body (IBM Plex Sans) over mono (IBM Plex Mono).
Soft ambient depth at rest, a gentle 2px lift on hover. Nothing floats.
First-party light and dark brand.yml themes, both contrast-checked to WCAG 2.1 AA.

rules.name: The Quartile Rule
rules.body: Each of the four accents maps to a use-case family and keeps that meaning everywhere: indigo = Foundations/links, coral = energy/notebooks, moss = code/success, amber = signal/advanced. Never pick an accent for decoration alone.

rules.name: The Warm-Ground Rule
rules.body: Pure #FFFFFF and pure #000000 are forbidden. The page is paper and ink; every neutral carries a trace of the brand's warmth.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Three families, no more: serif to display, sans to read, mono to signal code. Adding a fourth typeface is forbidden.

rules.name: The Caps-Label-Only Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is permitted only for labels of four words or fewer. Sentences and headings are never set in all caps.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are mixed from Ink (#1A1B2E), never pure black.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Intent Rule
rules.body: The 2px rise is reserved for surfaces the reader can actually click.

dos: Do keep the warm paper-and-ink ground. Background is Paper (#FBF7F0), text is Ink (#1A1B2E).
Do honor the Quartile Rule — each accent carries its use-case meaning everywhere it appears.
Do border cards on all four sides with a single hairline rule; let the ambient shadow and 2px hover lift carry separation and interactivity.
Do keep prose at 65-75ch and body type at line-height 1.65.
Do restrict uppercase to mono labels of <=4 words.
Do mix shadows from Ink, never black, and reserve the 2px lift for clickable surfaces.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every transition, and a visible :focus-visible ring everywhere.
Do verify Muted-on-Paper hits >=4.5:1 before using it for readable text; bump to Ink 2 if it's close.
donts: Don't ship the generic default docs theme look — the out-of-the-box Bootstrap/Quarto template is an explicit anti-reference.
Don't build a corporate SaaS landing — no gradient hero, no hero-metric stat blocks, no identical feature-card grids, no buzzword copy.
Don't overdesign — no decorative animation, no glassmorphism, no effect that competes with reading.
Don't use colored left-stripe borders greater than 1px on cards, list items, or grid items. The callout left-accent and the active-sidebar accent are the only sanctioned exceptions.
Don't scaffold sections with numbered markers (01 / 02) by reflex — numbers earn their place only in a genuine ordered sequence.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or pure-white/pure-black anywhere.
Don't add a fourth typeface, and don't set sentences or headings in all caps.
Don't use Muted gray for body text or placeholders — it fails contrast on warm paper.
